# CLEENLY

> CLEENLY is a small house cleaning company serving the Greater Seattle area (Washington State), operated by Pro Craft Cleaning LLC. Customers book online, see an upfront estimate before booking, and pay after the cleaning is complete — no payment is taken at booking.

## How pricing works
- Billed by the hour: $75 per cleaner-hour, typically a two-cleaner team.
- Minimum job: $185.
- The booking calculator shows an upfront estimate range based on service, home size, bathrooms, condition, and square footage. The final price is the actual cleaner-hours worked, confirmed before charging.

## Services & starting prices (estimates, not quotes)
- Regular Cleaning — recurring maintenance, from $185 (the first visit is priced as a deep clean)
- Deep Cleaning — from $290
- Move-Out Cleaning — from $380
- Move-In Cleaning — from $380
- Bi-Weekly Service — from $185
- Home Organization — from $185
- Pre-Event Cleaning — from $235
- Restorative Cleaning — from $320
- Airbnb Turnover — from $185
- Post-Construction — from $420

## Service area
Greater Seattle metro, from Everett in the north to Tacoma and Lakewood in the south — including Seattle, the Eastside (Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Sammamish, Issaquah), the south end (Renton, Kent, Federal Way, Auburn, Burien, Tukwila), Shoreline, Edmonds, Lynnwood, Everett, Tacoma, and Lakewood. Tacoma is our home base.

## Payment
No payment at booking. After the cleaning we email an invoice. We currently accept Venmo, Zelle, cash, or check; card payments are coming soon.
